allow:
Bash(git -C ci commit -m "chore(release): 1.0.0 - General Availability

HyperCI v1.0.0 - Production ready, general availability release.

This is a BREAKING CHANGE marking the official 1.0 GA release.

Major improvements in this release:
- Removed MCP server dependencies (simpler setup)
- Removed redundant gitci tool (consolidated to bootstrap)
- Added ci.version semver pinning
- Comprehensive configuration cascade documentation
- Test log consolidation
- Explicit TOML merge error handling
- 15 new integration tests

Breaking changes:
- MCP servers no longer auto-configured
- gitci tool removed (use bootstrap for git hooks)
- Node.js/npx no longer required

Migration:
- Update submodule: git submodule update --init --recursive
- Run bootstrap: ./ci/bootstrap --install
- No MCP setup needed

This release represents production-ready CI infrastructure.")

Bash(git -C ci tag -a v1.0.0 -m "HyperCI v1.0.0 - General Availability

Production-ready CI infrastructure for Python projects.

Major features:
- Modular architecture (common + language-specific)
- Configuration cascade (7 layers)
- Semver version pinning (ci.version)
- Test coverage (71 integration tests)
- Zero Node.js dependencies

Breaking changes from v0.3.2:
- MCP servers removed
- gitci tool removed")
